case_title: PARVIZ HATAMI VS. FARANAK A ALIABADI et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAY-09-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARANAK A. ALIABADI DDS, INC. D.B.A. PRO DENTAL CARE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,814.30 FILED BY HATAMI, PARVIZ AS TO DEFENDANT ALIABADI, FARANAK A FARANAK A. ALIABADI DDS, INC. D.B.A. PRO DENTAL CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER DEFENDANT. "DEFENDANT ASSERTS THAT THE ISSUE IS SUBJECT TO BINDING ARBITRATION THROUGH THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION BY CONTRACT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
